name: This verse grants permission to use prohibited things with three stipulations. First, one
introduction:
must be in a state of extreme compulsion, for example, being gravely ill or being so hungry
and thirsty that one's very life is in danger, and a prohibited thing is all that is available to
save one's life. Second, the person concerned should have no inclination to violate the Law
of God. Third, in consuming the prohibited thing one should not exceed the limits of bare
necessity. If a few bites or a few drops are enough to save one's life, one ought not to go
beyond the absolute minimum.
